privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target data is completely synthetically generated using a dummy base64 GIF file via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected target settings (thumbnail size 200x200, unchecking year/month folders), the exact names of the 3 images to be deleted, and the exact alt text for the 4 remaining images perfectly match the explicit task instructions and export_result.sh verifier.
